title: The Subjunctive Mood
shortSummary: Enter the world of the subjunctive — the mood that expresses wishes, doubts, emotions, and hypotheticals. This is where intermediate learners become advanced speakers.
whyItMatters: The subjunctive is what separates intermediate speakers from advanced ones. It lets you express nuance — 'I hope that', 'I doubt that', 'It is important that'. Without it, your Spanish sounds flat and overly simple.
coreConcepts: When to use the subjunctive vs indicative
WEIRDO triggers: Wishes, Emotions, Impersonal expressions, Recommendations, Doubt, Ojalá
Common subjunctive triggers: espero que, dudo que, es importante que
